warnings: no small-title `label` type-role (eyebrow/kicker) — capture charter.fonts.label so small titles don't default to mono (Component L)

identity.essence: Quiet, editorial, gallery-neutral. Work rooted in looking.
identity.positioning: Madrid-based visual artist presenting contemporary painting with curatorial restraint.

archetype.rationale: Creator (the making/looking practice) lead; Sage (perception, the gaze, identity) secondary — from the artist's own statement.

boilerplate.confidentiality: Confidential — price list, not for circulation
boilerplate.copyright: © {{year}} Rebeca Elmúdesi. All works and images reproduced by permission of the artist.

evidence.note: Client email 2026-06-16 (subject 'Re: Setting up your branded workspace'): well curated, spacious, contemporary and professional... all the texts justified, the artworks with space to breathe... thin margins in the borders (no bleeding to the sides)... no dropshadows or additional nonsense. do not stretch the images either, keep everything faithful... source all the info ONLY from my imput and website.

principles: Give each artwork room to breathe; the work leads and the layout recedes.
Mirror the structure of a professional art portfolio; the website's sections define the document's sections.
Source every fact, title, and description only from Rebeca's own input and website; never invent copy.
Attribute each description to its correct artwork.
signatureElements: Generous white space on a pure white ground
Thin, even margins on every side; images contained, never bleeding to the edge
Faithful image reproduction at true aspect ratio
antiPatterns: Full-bleed images or any bleed to the page edges
Stretched or distorted images (any change to the true aspect ratio)
Invented or unsourced titles, descriptions, or copy

spec.rhythm: white-dominant — pure white ground everywhere; NO dark surfaces (the gallery white wall)

photo.treatment: faithful reproduction at true aspect ratio, contained, never bleeding to the edge

evidence.source: ornament:none — no gradients, ever; depth is white space + thin black hairline, never a wash

spec.margins: thin, even margins on every side
spec.imagePolicy: contained & centered, never bleeding, true aspect ratio

evidence.source: no icon system — an art portfolio's wayfinding is type + hairline rules; no clip art (explicit anti-pattern)

spec.borders: 1px black hairline frame; images contained, flat on the wall
spec.depth: via thin black hairline only — NO drop shadows, NO rounded corners (both explicit anti-patterns)

spec.name: hairline-red-rule
spec.geometry: thin black hairline rules are the structural mark; a short RED #fe0200 rule marks the single accent moment (section open / current work)
spec.meaning: curatorial restraint — red is rare and deliberate; the work leads

evidence.source: static — the work leads; the layout and any motion recede; no motion (William, GATE A 2026-07-02)
no pattern system — texture is white space + thin black hairlines only
faithful reproduction at true aspect ratio, contained; handled by the image system / images.manifest, not a grammar treatment

Source every fact, title, and description only from Rebeca's own input and website; never invent copy.
